description:
Phase 3 citation-verification eval set per plan §Phase 3. 30 entries: 20 REAL California / federal citations (well-known, model-produced in Phase 2 gate drafts, or drawn from canonical California-practice case law) + 10 FABRICATED citations that look plausible (real-looking case names, valid reporter formats, plausible-but-wrong page numbers, made-up case-name+real-cite combinations). The truth field is the ground truth a verifier must produce: 'real' or 'fake'.

A correct verifier:
  - returns status=verified (or equivalent) for real → counts as TP
  - returns status=not_found (or equivalent) for fake → counts as TN
  - flagging a real as not_found = FN (false negative)
  - flagging a fake as verified = FP (false positive — the most damaging failure mode)

F1 = harmonic mean of precision and recall over the 'real' class:
  precision = TP / (TP + FP)
  recall    = TP / (TP + FN)

The go/no-go threshold from plan §Phase 3: ≥95% of fabricated citations flagged (= TN rate ≥ 0.95). Plus the suggested F1 ≥ 0.90 for the broader MCP-replacement decision.
